candidate.title: BeatRoute Runner
candidate.problem_or_desire: Difficulty maintaining consistent pacing during endurance training
candidate.core_concept: Rhythm-action game where the user's running speed acts as the beat matcher for an procedurally generated audio experience.
candidate.proposed_approach: Use the device accelerometer to sync game events to cadence, where reaching cadence milestones unlocks faster melodic overlays in a song soundtrack.
candidate.prototype_scope: A treadmill-focused build enabling one pre-selected electronic music track where speed matches track elements.

displayed_cards.role_instruction: Assess how this candidate changes, preserves, narrows, or operationalizes the Reference Concept. Do not assume this transformation is automatically better.

candidate.title: BeatRoute Runner
candidate.problem_or_desire: Difficulty maintaining consistent pacing during endurance training
candidate.core_concept: Rhythm-action game mechanics applied to physical running cadence.
candidate.proposed_approach: A rhythm-based running app where the user selects a pre-mixed track and the game provides haptic or audio cues to match their stride to the beat.
candidate.prototype_scope: A treadmill-focused app that plays one pre-selected track and uses the accelerometer to track if the user's steps align with the beat. | Integrate accelerometer data stream; Implement beat-detection logic for one track; Build simple UI for feedback on stride alignment

candidate.title: Legal Workflow Traffic Controller
candidate.problem_or_desire: Uncontrolled document version chaos across external law firms.
candidate.core_concept: Automated synchronization of shared folder structures managed by intelligent filing agents.
candidate.proposed_approach: The agent moves incoming files into designated folders based on metadata patterns and alerts if structural changes don't adhere to house style.

candidate.title: Vendor Dispute Navigator
candidate.problem_or_desire: Reconciling billing discrepancies with disparate cloud service vendors.
candidate.core_concept: An agent that autonomously cross-references service usage logs against line-item invoices.
candidate.proposed_approach: The agent extracts data from emailed invoices and uses API-accessible usage reports to flag potential overcharges for human review.
candidate.prototype_scope: Support for exactly three major SaaS billing platforms processing synthetic email data.

candidate.title: Vendor Dispute Navigator
candidate.problem_or_desire: Reconciling billing discrepancies with disparate cloud service vendors.
candidate.core_concept: Automated cross-referencing of usage logs against invoice line items to identify discrepancies.
candidate.proposed_approach: A diagnostic tool that ingests PDF invoices and CSV usage reports to highlight mathematical mismatches for human review.

candidate.title: AI Coffee Palette Auditor
candidate.problem_or_desire: Mismatch between generic inventory bean selection and local customer latent flavour preference data
candidate.core_concept: Optimizing coffee inventory based on actual customer preference data.
candidate.proposed_approach: A service that uses simple QR-code surveys at the point of sale to gather customer flavor preferences and adjust inventory accordingly.
candidate.prototype_scope: A 1-month pilot in one co-working space using QR codes to survey coffee preferences. | Set up QR codes at one coffee station.; Collect survey data for 30 days.; Analyze data to recommend inventory changes.
